creator: jkois@freebsd.org
text:
Hello,

I just checked your website.  And I did not find any FreeBSD related 
courses there (just several for Linux).

Which is a problem.  As these lists are for vendors/consultants/ISPs 
with a relation/connection to FreeBSD.  Unless we can get some details 
confirming this connection, we will have to close this PR as it does not 
match the criteria for including it in the list.

Timeout:	2 weeks

Regards

jkois

-- 
  Johann Kois
  jkois(at)FreeBSD.org
  FreeBSD Documentation Project
  FreeBSD German Documentation Project - https://doc.bsdgroup.de
